description:
Advances: specled.branch_guard, specled.mix_tasks

BranchCheck emits a finding when the current change set adds a new must requirement without a backing @tag spec annotation. Mix tasks gain --test-tags / --no-test-tags flags on spec.check and spec.validate with precedence CLI > config > default.

Touches:
- lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex
- lib/specled_ex/change_analysis.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.validate.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.prime.ex
- test/specled_ex/branch_check_test.exs
- test/mix/tasks/spec_tasks_test.exs

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Branch guard emits finding for new untagged must requirements
- [ ] --test-tags / --no-test-tags flags work end-to-end
- [ ] Precedence CLI > config > default verified by test
- [ ] Existing branch guard tests pass
- [ ] mix spec.check passes for specled.branch_guard and specled.mix_tasks
title: S4: Branch Guard + Mix task flags
